xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NoteForNonApplicabilityOfTheDi: The Bank has not defaulted on any loans and debt securities during the half-year ended September 30, 2025.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RelatedPartyTransactionExplana: Transaction in the nature of Banker-Customer Relationship inculding those with KMP and relatives of KMP have not been disclosed in terms of Para 5 of AS -18
